title: Malty Norwegian Creamy Bao
description: Soft, fluffy bao filled with a rich, malty, creamy sauce and topped with crispy scallions. Best served as a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Shredded Norwegian krumkake (or other sweet bread)
ingredients.notes: soaked in 2 tablespoons of sherry vinegar

instructions: Heat the butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat until melted. Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking continuously to prevent lumps. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Add the shredded krumkake, heavy cream, sugar, cardamom, and salt. Cook, stirring constantly, over medium heat for 2-3 minutes.
Increase the heat to medium-high and cook, stirring constantly, for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened to your liking.
Meanwhile, cook the bao dough according to the package instructions. Once cooked, split the dough in half lengthwise to create a pocket for the filling.
Spoon the malty creamy sauce into the pocket, followed by a few pieces of sliced scallion on top.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
